AI-focused Java Developer

Practical AI-assisted development, migration automation, enterprise integration

Senior Java developer with 10+ years of experience in backend development, enterprise integration, and automation. I combine strong Java/Spring engineering fundamentals with practical AI experience - currently using Claude Code for RPG-to-Java migration, structured prompting, Markdown context files, agent/subagent workflows, and production-ready review of AI-generated code.

What I bring: strong Java/Spring backend experience, enterprise legacy-system understanding, practical AI-assisted migration work, Scrum team collaboration, and the ability to translate complex technical work into structured plans, documentation, tests, and maintainable implementation.
